basic_details.job_title: ECHS Kolkata Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Medical and Non Medical staff Posts
basic_details.short_information: Ex-Servicemen Contributory Health Scheme Station (ECHS Kolkata) has officially released the Medical and Non Med staff Recruitment 2026 notification for 3 vacancies at Kolkata. Eligible graduates, MBBS holders, and 8th pass candidates aged up to 66 years can apply offline up to 26 May 2026 through the ECHS application process. Selected candidates will be appointed on a contractual basis with a monthly salary of ₹95,000/- for Officer-in-Charge and Medical Officer posts, and ₹21,800/- for Chowkidar posts.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.age_details: Max 66 years for Medical Officer, 63 years for OIC Polyclinic, 53 years for Chowkidar as on 01-06-2026.
age_limit.details: Officer-in-Charge: Maximum age 63 years as on 01-06-2026. Medical Officer: Maximum age 66 years as on 01-06-2026. Chowkidar: Maximum age 53 years as on 01-06-2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate with 5 years experience for Officer-in-Charge, MBBS with 3 years experience for Medical Officer, 8th Class for Chowkidar.
qualification.details: Officer-in-Charge: Graduate, minimum 05 years work experience in Health Care Institutions or Managerial positions. Medical Officer: MBBS, minimum 03 years experience after internship. Chowkidar: Class 8th, General Duty Trade for Armed Forces Personnel.

salary_details.details: Officer-in-Charge: Rs 95,000/- Medical Officer: Rs 95,000/- Chowkidar: Rs 21,800/-

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for ECHS Kolkata Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.echs.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 26-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for ECHS Kolkata Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application form for ECHS Kolkata Recruitment 2026 is 26th May 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for ECHS Kolkata Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies announced for the ECHS Kolkata Recruitment 2026. These vacancies are for the posts of Officer-in-Charge, Medical Officer, and Chowkidar.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Medical Officer post?
faq.answer: For the Medical Officer post, candidates must possess an MBBS degree and have a minimum of 3 years of experience after completing their internship. This is a crucial requirement for the role.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Chowkidar post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Chowkidar post is 53 years as of 01-06-2026. Candidates applying for this position should ensure they meet this age criterion.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Officer-in-Charge position?
faq.answer: The salary offered for the Officer-in-Charge position is Rs 95,000/- per month. This is a competitive salary for the role and experience required.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for ECHS Kolkata Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: As per the information available, there is no application fee mentioned in the official notification for the ECHS Kolkata Recruitment 2026. Candidates can apply without paying any fee.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for ECHS Kolkata Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The mode of application for ECHS Kolkata Recruitment 2026 is offline. Candidates need to download the application form, fill it, and submit it via post or by hand to the specified address.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for the posts announced under ECHS Kolkata Recruitment 2026 will be based on an interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their qualifications and experience for the interview round.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I download the application form?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official website of ECHS, which is www.echs.gov.in. It is recommended to download the form from the official source to ensure accuracy.

faq.question: Q10. What documents are required to be submitted with the application?
faq.answer: Candidates need to submit self-attested photocopies of testimonials supporting their educational qualifications and work experience, along with Discharge Book, PPO (if applicable), PAN card, and Aadhar card with their application.
